_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of industry standard security models.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-009 (RC, cosine: 0.572), RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.575). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, security]. DCWF-only terms [industry, models, standard] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, chain, controls, dataset, fine, integrity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.923, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.070 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of industry standard security models." and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.659 > STS 0.575 (gap +0.085). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, security] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, security]. DCWF-only: [industry, models, standard]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, chain, controls, dataset, fine, integrity].

signals.detail: STS 0.575 classified as Equal but closer to Superset threshold. Classification may be over-generous.
